atlas: Walker_2019 neocortex (QTD000579), mid-gestation developing cortex, n=211 donors
source: eQTL Catalogue via mcp-human-genetics, marginal (best-p) associations only — NO fine-mapping/SuSiE available through this connector

magnitude_spearman.note: all n.s. or weakly negative on all-tested; sig-subset AG=+0.001 n.s.

interpretation: MARGINAL associations show NO model tracking in this second cohort — consistent with the paper's documented finding that marginal/lead-SNP QTLs fail as benchmarks (cf. GTEx lead-SNP z-score rho=0.001). It REPLICATES that null in an independent developing-cortex atlas but is NOT a second confirmation of the fine-mapped tracking result (Gandal rho=0.238), because fine-mapped causal effects are not retrievable here.
contribution: Robustness for the 'fine-mapping is required' sub-claim; NOT a headline second referee.
